subcodes.first_line: The glory of Him Whom God shall make manifest is immeasurably above every other glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: و ان بهاء من یظهره الله فوق کل بهاء وان جلاله فوق کل جلال وان جماله فوق کل جمال وان عظمته فوق کل عظمة
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
